name: Free AI Automation Audit
purpose: Review the business workflow, identify automation opportunities, and discuss practical AI solutions.
good_fit_for: Businesses spending too much time replying to repeated enquiries.
Teams that want to automate lead capture, FAQs, admin, booking flows, or follow-up.
Professional service businesses that need clear handoff routes to WhatsApp, booking, or quote requests.
what_to_prepare: Business name and website if available.
A short description of the repeated task or workflow they want to automate.
Any current tools used for enquiries, booking, email, forms, CRM, or spreadsheets.
handoff_copy: Would you like to request a free AI audit?
